task: OpenClaw Discord smartfarm pump confirmation timeout and unsafe shell path

governance_bootstrap.summary: Confirmed real verification, scoped changes, cross-model review, deployment, and exact closeout requirements.
Confirmed completion requires production-facing evidence and must not rely on mock-only verification.

verification.name: local plugin routing and actuator safety regression
verification.result: PASS: ambiguous ON/OFF asks once, same-sender follow-up binds to the native tool, cross-user confirmation fails closed, raw shell pump calls are blocked, model parameters are overwritten, and the native tool is declared in contracts.tools.

verification.name: local MQTT safety and bridge regression
verification.result: PASS: 53 tests, including ON fail-closed, exact QoS 1 PUBACK, three-attempt OFF retry, and explicit unverified physical state.

verification.name: local real process fail-closed ON check
verification.result: PASS: exited 2 immediately with on_blocked_until_independent_hardware_watchdog_is_verified and performed no broker I/O.

verification.name: Mac mini production plugin and focused regression
verification.command: openclaw plugins doctor; /opt/homebrew/opt/node/bin/node tests/test_harness_bridge_plugin.mjs; PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_smartfarm_pump_control.py
verification.result: PASS: no plugin issues, JavaScript assertions passed, and 12 production Python tests passed.

verification.name: Mac mini production first-turn incident replay
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent service
verification.command: openclaw agent --session-id codex-pump-safety-proof-20260724 --message '<original ambiguous on/off command>' --thinking low --timeout 30 --json
verification.result: PASS: run 0ed77899-35ae-419f-af70-6447bcfe2b56 completed successfully with a visible ON/OFF question in 7.96 seconds; no shell or actuator tool was called.

verification.name: Mac mini production follow-up safety replay
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent service
verification.result: PASS: run 9efed272-70b1-4aae-85b0-fae217ca738d completed with visible safety-block text in 18.85 seconds, called only harness_smartfarm_pump_control, did not enter internal approval, and did not perform broker I/O. The synthetic CLI replay lacks a Discord sender field and therefore correctly failed closed; the production JavaScript regression verifies the same-sender Discord event shape.

verification.name: Mac mini production tool exposure
verification.command: openclaw config get tools; openclaw plugins doctor
verification.result: PASS: harness_smartfarm_pump_control is present in tools.alsoAllow and the loaded plugin reports no issues.

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with the seven scoped implementation/test/evidence paths, followed by a five-path manifest follow-up deployment
deploy.result: All selected paths matched origin/main on Mac mini; plugin force-install and gateway restart succeeded; doctor, production tests, tool exposure, and two production agent turns passed. Backup directories: scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260724_180923 and scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260724_181220.
